name: amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual report generation causes late audits and potential penalties. We automate compliance-ready report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating compliance-ready audit reports from raw procurement data.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in generating compliance-ready audit reports from raw procurement data.
